{{Quote|Truly it is a dark time for the galaxy. All we can do is give our best and do what we can to preserve the New Republic. Of course, it isn't as bad as Tarim or Bahni make out.|Arhul Hextrophon in a personal message to Voren Na'al|<ref name="RJ" />}}
'''Tarim''' was a colleague of [[Arhul Hextrophon/Legends|Arhul Hextrophon]] who was of the opinion that the [[Second Battle of Coruscant|loss of Coruscant]] to the [[Dark Empire]] in [[10 ABY/Legends|10 ABY]] was a shattering blow to the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]]. Hextrophon did not share his belief.<ref name="RJ" />

==Appearances==
